3084200.name: Realm Drifter
3084200.description:
Embark on an immersive journey through diverse, stunning landscapes, each with its own unique atmosphere and secrets to uncover. Every realm offers a new adventure. Realm Drifter invites you to lose yourself in its beautifully detailed hand-crafted worlds, where every step reveals something extraordinary in this retro 2000s graphical walking sim.

What to expect?

- Driven by a non-linear gameplay
- A handcrafted and detailed world featuring different & unique atmospheres and environments
- Small, Medium & Large open world levels
- Original OST
- Future additions of new realms to explore
- Floating foliage that we missed

This game is intended to be a relaxing game, with chill calm music to accompany the player as they indulge in a magical world(s) and escape from life for a bit.
3084200.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
